data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a witness signature option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'witness signature option' as part of the liability waiver process. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or implementation of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for a witness signature option, but lacks specific evidence or endpoints to demonstrate its coverage, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation of a witness signature option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for witness signature option
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of a witness signature option.
